Title: AI Model Idle · 인공지능 키우기

URL Source: https://game.trae.academy/

Markdown Content:
AI Model Idle

인공지능 키우기

From toy cat-vs-dog classifier to a near-AGI Foundation Model

Collect data, buy compute, train models, ship products, weather crises, fire employees — then watch them sue you, found a rival, or leak on Glassdoor. Almost everything that happens in the AI industry, as an idle game.

Built so AI insiders laugh and outsiders accidentally learn how the industry actually works.

[▶ Play](https://game.trae.academy/play)

🔬

### Branching perk tree

Data · Compute · Model · Product × 3 tiers = 36 perks + 4 synergies

🚨

### 25 crisis events

Copyright lawsuit, congressional hearing, jailbreak leak, X smear, hedge fund short

🤝

### 8 hardware partners

NVIDIA · AMD · Groq · Cerebras · FuriosaAI · Google · Apple · Tenstorrent

🚪

### Employees that fight back

Fire them brutally and they sue, start a rival startup, or leak on Glassdoor

Progress saves to your browser (localStorage). Sign in to sync to the cloud. Ad slots and payments are demo only — nothing is actually charged.
